title: MozzaBite Crunchy Twist
description: A kid-friendly vegan twist on mozzarella bites with a tangy and crumbly texture, perfect for snacks or meals.

ingredients.name: Vegan Mozzarella Cheese
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's available in your local store or order online.

ingredients.name: All-Purpose Flour
ingredients.notes: Use gluten-free flour if needed for dietary restrictions.

ingredients.name: Vegetable Oil
ingredients.notes: For frying or coating the bites.

instructions: Mix all ingredients except the oil in a bowl until well combined.
Knead the dough into a ball, then divide it into small balls about the size of a walnut.
Dip each bite into vegetable oil and shake off excess.
Place bites on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake for 10 minutes or until golden brown.
Serve hot as a snack or meal enhancer.
